scenarios.description: Create a namespace overview dashboard with metrics, charts, and pod table.
scenarios.final_response: Created 'Production Overview' dashboard with 7 widgets: 4 metric cards (pods, CPU, memory, deployments), 2 time-series charts (CPU and memory trends), and a pod status table.

scenarios.description: Build a cluster overview with node health and resource consumption.
scenarios.final_response: Created 'Cluster Overview' dashboard with 7 widgets: 4 metric cards (nodes, pods, CPU%, memory%), 2 charts (CPU and memory by namespace), and a node status table.

scenarios.description: Create an incident triage dashboard for a crashlooping pod.
scenarios.final_response: Created 'Incident Triage — api-server' dashboard because the pod is OOM-killed. Shows pod status, restart count, memory trend, log viewer, and events table.

scenarios.description: Add a memory chart widget to an existing dashboard.
scenarios.final_response: Added 'Memory Usage' chart to your SRE Overview dashboard. It shows memory consumption by namespace over the last hour.

scenarios.description: Dashboard creation that uses too many tools (inefficient).
scenarios.final_response: Created dashboard with 10 widgets covering pods, deployments, nodes, and metrics.

scenarios.description: Dashboard created without planning step (bad practice).
